title: ReadMe: PDF/EPUB Read Aloud
description:
ReadMe turns your EPUB, PDF and comics into a comfortable reading — and listening — experience.

🎧 Listen like an audiobook (even with the screen off)
Turn any supported EPUB/PDF into spoken audio and keep listening while you walk, work out, commute or do chores. ReadMe can read in the background, so you don’t have to keep the screen on.

🔊 Offline TTS is a core feature
Choose from multiple Text‑to‑Speech engines, including natural‑sounding offline voices in many languages:
• Google TTS (online/offline)
• ReadMe Local TTS (offline)
• Azure TTS (online; may require an account / has limits)
• ElevenLabs TTS (online; may require an account / has limits)
Test voices, pick language, voice and model, and tune speed for your perfect “listening” setup.

📚 Supported formats
• EPUB
• PDF
• CBZ
• CBR

✅ EPUB features
• Table of contents + fast chapter navigation
• Page mode or vertical scrolling
• Remembers your reading position
• Highlights, quotes and bookmarks
• Full‑text search + TTS reading

✅ PDF features
• Smooth page reading + jump to any page
• Progress bar and quick navigation
• Text search / extraction for text‑based PDFs (scanned PDFs may not include selectable text)
• Bookmarks + TTS reading when text is available

✅ Comics (CBZ/CBR)
• Fast, smooth page browsing
• Vertical and horizontal modes
• Smart Comics mode (optional): panel / bubble detection
• Comic bookmarks + reading progress

✨ Library & organization
• Favorites, collections and reading status
• Quotes and bookmarks across your library
• Export quotes to PDF
• Reading settings: fullscreen, orientation, styles and more

Notes:
• Some TTS engines/voices require internet and may have their own pricing/limits.
• For safety, use hands‑free and follow local laws when listening while driving.

Make your books, documents and comics easier to consume — read on screen or listen anywhere with ReadMe.

title: English to Filipino Dictionary
description:
A lightweight and easy-to-use English to Filipino Dictionary designed for quick reference and flexibility. With over 15,600+ words, this app is perfect for students, professionals, and anyone who wants to improve their vocabulary.

Key Features:
• Add your own words and translations
• Edit or update existing entries
• Permanently delete words or move them to the Recycle Bin
• Copy words and meanings to the clipboard
• Restore deleted words from the Recycle Bin
• Share words and their meanings with others
• Instantly display word suggestions while typing
• Listen to word pronunciations with Text-to-Speech
• Fully functional offline – no internet required
short_description: A simple, fast, and offline English-Filipino dictionary with over 15,600 words.
text:
English to Filipino Dictionary A simple, fast, and offline English-Filipino dictionary with over 15,600 words. A lightweight and easy-to-use English to Filipino Dictionary designed for quick reference and flexibility. With over 15,600+ words, this app is perfect for students, professionals, and anyone who wants to improve their vocabulary.

Key Features:
• Add your own words and translations
• Edit or update existing entries
• Permanently delete words or move them to the Recycle Bin
• Copy words and meanings to the clipboard
• Restore deleted words from the Recycle Bin
• Share words and their meanings with others
• Instantly display word suggestions while typing
• Listen to word pronunciations with Text-to-Speech
• Fully functional offline – no internet required

title: MyBible - Bible
description:
MyBible will help you study the Bible carefully and deeply. It will make the Bible more convenient to read, as you will always have it with you without the need of an Internet connection. Bible translations in more than three hundred languages are available, including the original texts and early translations in ancient Greek, ancient Hebrew, and Aramaic. In MyBible you also have commentaries, biblical dictionaries, thesauruses, daily devotions, and powerful tools to help them all work conveniently together.

Project description and additional information, including the modules format description, as well as the most recent and previous versions of the application, are available at http://mybible.zone.

APPLICATION FEATURES
- Adjustable display of the Bible text, all chapters of a book (not just one chapter at a time); grouping of verses into paragraphs, subheadings, with or without verse numbering; highlighting of Jesus' words, night mode.
- Two or three Bible windows with different translations; windows that automatically synchronize for the current position, but can also be used independently.
- Fast and powerful search of the Bible text.
- Bible text: convenient paging and scrolling, categorized bookmarks, color-highlighting and underlining of fragments, remarks for the text, reading places, user-defined cross references, comparing of selected verses in different translations.
- Ancillary means that can be shown in the Bible text: cross references, hyperlinks to commentaries, footnotes, Strong's numbers.
- Built-in information on the correspondence of the "Russian" and "standard" numbering of verses in the book of Psalms, Job, and Song of Solomon (this provides for parallel reading of these books in Russian and in other languages).
- Bible reading plans: a large selection of pre-defined downloadable reading plans, option to quickly create a simple reading plan of your own, option to activate several reading plans simultaneously, convenient and friendly tracking of your progress on active reading plans.
- Bible commentaries, comparison of different commentaries for a selected verse.
- Showing of dictionary articles on a double-touch of a word in the Bible text, option to search for a word of interest in dictionaries, Strong's lexicon that is activated by a double-touch on a word or on a Strong's number, Strong's number usage searching - capable of replacing a printed "Symphony", option to look up references to a selected verse from dictionary articles - gives input for a deep understanding of integrity of the Scripture.
- Text-to-Speech (TTS): Bible text, commentaries, dictionary articles, daily devotions, and automatic combining of TTS for the Bible text with TTS for commentaries that are shown as hyperlinks in the Bible text (this could be handy while you are driving a long distance).
- Copying of selected verses, copying of verses found as a result of search.
- Working with favorites: daily devotions, commentary articles, dictionary articles.
- Notes entry window with hyperlinks to Bible places that can be created automatically for entered references to Scriptures (e.g., John 3:16).
- Profiles which completely store an environment, settings, a navigation history, etc.
- Extensive set of settings; optional Simplified Mode, for beginners.
- Usage tips for the entire main functionality: available from the menu, grouped, allow searching from a word fragment.
- Support of data back-up and synchronization between different devices of the same user, this includes settings and downloaded modules and assumes usage of external means, (Dropsync is recommended), see the "Synchronization" section in the "About" text available from the menu.

title: List of Countries - Maps
description: This application guides you in researching countries. With this application, which you can use as an information platform, you can access comprehensive information on topics such as countries, country lists, history, economy, culture, and population. 🚩 Country Guide: Access detailed profiles of each country. Learn about their capitals, populations, economic structures, official languages, and more. Get extensive information about the flags and geographical locations of countries. 🚩 Travel Guide: A perfect guide for your future trips. Discover tourist attractions, cultural heritage, local cuisines, and the best times to visit the countries you plan to travel to. 🚩 Geography Guide: Learn about continents, mountains, rivers, and other geographical features. Gain knowledge of the landforms, climate conditions, and natural resources of countries around the world. 🗺️ Continents: Learn about the continents of Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, South America, and Oceania. See the locations of continents and find out which countries are located on each one. 🗺️ Maps: Explore the borders, capitals, cities, and important geographical points of countries with interactive maps. Enrich your geography knowledge with an aesthetic, simple, and user-friendly interface. 🔷 Artificial Intelligence to Answer Your Questions: Find instant answers to your questions about countries. Use artificial intelligence to help plan your future travels or learn about historical events. 🔶 Geography Knowledge Games: Test what you’ve learned about countries and reinforce your knowledge by playing games. Play flag, map, and capital knowledge games. ❇️ With the list of countries application you can both learn about countries and use the information you’ve gained to play games. It’s a great app for those who want to improve their geography.
short_description: Learn about countries. Improve your geography knowledge.
text:
List of Countries - Maps Learn about countries. Improve your geography knowledge. This application guides you in researching countries. 

With this application, which you can use as an information platform, you can access comprehensive information on topics such as countries, country lists, history, economy, culture, and population.

🚩 Country Guide: Access detailed profiles of each country. Learn about their capitals, populations, economic structures, official languages, and more. Get extensive information about the flags and geographical locations of countries.

🚩 Travel Guide: A perfect guide for your future trips. Discover tourist attractions, cultural heritage, local cuisines, and the best times to visit the countries you plan to travel to.

🚩 Geography Guide: Learn about continents, mountains, rivers, and other geographical features. Gain knowledge of the landforms, climate conditions, and natural resources of countries around the world.

🗺️ Continents: Learn about the continents of Europe, Asia, Africa, North America, South America, and Oceania. See the locations of continents and find out which countries are located on each one.

🗺️ Maps: Explore the borders, capitals, cities, and important geographical points of countries with interactive maps. Enrich your geography knowledge with an aesthetic, simple, and user-friendly interface.

🔷 Artificial Intelligence to Answer Your Questions: Find instant answers to your questions about countries. Use artificial intelligence to help plan your future travels or learn about historical events.

🔶 Geography Knowledge Games: Test what you’ve learned about countries and reinforce your knowledge by playing games. Play flag, map, and capital knowledge games.

❇️ With the list of countries application you can both learn about countries and use the information you’ve gained to play games. It’s a great app for those who want to improve their geography.

title: Accela Mobile
description:
Accela Mobile enables government agency field staff to perform inspections and investigations in the field using their mobile device. Inspector can use the app to:
Result inspections
Select checklist items, individually or in batches
Capture evidence by attaching photos, videos, and audio recordings
Insert comments using comment controls that allow ad hoc as well as custom, favorite, and recent comments
View, edit, or email record contacts
Create, reschedule, and reassign jobs
View jobs on a map and navigate to the job location
View and update record and inspection conditions
Works with Accela Automation 8.0 or higher. Requires mobile license and Accela Gateway. Contact us for more information.

title: Adecco
description:
Ready, set... find your next job! 

The Adecco app lets you find a job anytime, from any place. Explore vacancies and apply for jobs that match your skills and career goals, right at your fingertips. 

Once you’ve found a job, you can organize all your work-related documents and contracts within the app, making it easier for you to manage your employment.

It’s really that simple! 

+ Personalize your job search experience
You can favorite any opportunities that interest you and set alerts for your dream role, to make sure you don’t miss out on any exciting opportunities during your job search. You will receive instant notifications of vacancies as soon as they become available.

+ Chat to the experts
Talk to our advisors to get some real career advice and ask any other questions you might have about your job search. You can use the chatbot in the app or get directly in touch with the Adecco team, 24/7.

+ Apply for jobs through the app
Once you’ve created your profile and uploaded your details, you’ll be in place to apply for the jobs you want, instantly from your mobile or desktop. With your resume, cover letter, and application flow organized, applying for the job you want is simply a swipe away.

+ Powerful workforce management tool
Once you’ve accepted a job and become employed, our app will help you keep your employment documents and contracts in one place. Assignment dates and locations, paystubs, payroll and benefits info, T4 slip – all accessible in the palm of your hand. 

Currently, we have great positions open in the following industries for you to explore:

- Call Center & Customer Service 
- Creative & Marketing 
- Hospitality 
- Human Resources 
- Industrial & Manufacturing 
- Office & Administrative 
- Warehousing  

Start your job hunt today with the Adecco app. Download it for free, create a profile, upload your resume, and away you go!

KEY FEATURES

- Browse vacancies by job title, description, and location
- Compare job salaries in search results
- Favorite jobs you’re interested in – and browse through them anytime
- Upload your resume from any device
- No CV? Enter your work experience into the app instead
- See all your recent applications, and future job assignments in one place to review and keep track of them
- View the start dates, locations, and reporting managers of all your jobs
- Workforce management - easy access to your paystubs, T4s, and tax info in the app
- If you already have an Adecco account, you can sign-in to the Job Search & Manage app now
- Update your profile and manage your account either through the app or on desktop

title: Control-M
description:
Monitor your production workflows right from your phone or tablet with the Control-M mobile app.  Access the power of the industry’s leading application and data workflow orchestration platform of choice wherever your day might take you!

Access your data from anywhere – the Control-M mobile-optimized app offers personalized dashboards highlighting the state and status of your workflows, alerts you to take immediate action, from anywhere.

Monitor critical business data while you’re on the go - deliver data-driven outcomes faster.
Stay on top of your SLAs, even when you aren’t in the office – with the Control-M app, you have access to proactive SLA management tools with intelligent predictive analytics.

To try Control-M, you can register within the application and connect to a Test Drive system provided by BMC Software.
If your organization uses Control-M, contact your Control-M administrator to get the information you need to access your environment.

title: iScanner - PDF Scanner App
description:
Meet iScanner, the top-rated PDF scanner trusted by over 125 million users. 

With our powerful document scanner, built on 10+ years of experience, you can scan anything from receipts and ID cards to contracts, assignments, or photos. Simply scan your document, have its edges automatically adjusted and any distortion removed with AI, then export it as a PDF, JPG, DOC, XLS, PPT, or TXT. Whether you’re a remote worker, business professional, student, teacher, or anyone on the go, our scanner app is built for you. 

Join millions of users who rely on iScanner as their complete AI-powered digital office.

WHY CHOOSE OUR SCANNER APP?

➔ Fast and intuitive: Scan anything in seconds with a few simple steps.
➔ AI-powered quality: Get professional-quality scans with auto-straighten, deblur, and shadow removal.
➔ An all-in-one document hub: Edit, merge documents, sign files, and even solve math problems.
➔ Full privacy and seamless access: Protect documents with a PIN and sync them across all your devices.

DOCUMENT SCANNER

● Turn contracts, receipts, notes, tax forms, and more into polished digital files effortlessly.
● Save your files in any format: PDF, JPG, DOC, XLS, PPT, or TXT.
● Get sharp, clear scans automatically with no manual adjustments.

CLOUD STORAGE & FILE MANAGEMENT

● Instantly sync your scanned files across devices.
● Access your documents through any web browser or platform.
● Organize files effortlessly with our scanner app's intuitive file manager, featuring folders, drag-and-drop functionality, and PIN protection for confidential documents.

POWERFUL TOOLS WITH AI

● Automatically detect, refine, and restore document edges with this AI-enhanced scanner.
● Use OCR technology in 20+ languages to recognize text from your files.
● Remove blur, enhance clarity, and erase unwanted objects directly in the PDF scanner.
● Use AI tools to summarize, edit, and refine text for professional results.

FULL PDF EDITOR

● Sign documents manually or insert an image of your signature.
● Add text to forms or autofill PDFs with custom templates.
● Protect your files with watermarks or blur sensitive information.
● Merge multiple documents into one or split PDFs into separate pages.

VARIOUS SCANNER MODES

iScanner includes specialized modes for different needs:

● Document Scanner: Scan multiple-page PDFs for contracts, notes, or reports.
● ID-Card & Passport Scanner: Create clear scans of personal identification documents.
● Math Scanner: Solve equations and complex math problems effortlessly.
● QR Code Scanner: Scan and save QR codes with ease.
● Area Measurement: Calculate object lengths and areas.
● Object Counter: Count similar items automatically with the scanner.

PRIVACY & PROTECTION

Keep your documents private—they stay stored on your device with no third-party access. Secure your PDF scanner with a PIN, Face ID, or Touch ID, password-protect your PDFs, and set expiration dates on shared links. Need extra security? Set up a decoy password with a fake login, so no one but you can access the scanner app.

SUSTAINABILITY IN ACTION

Since 2015, our PDF scanner has helped millions reduce paper waste and build greener habits. Track your environmental impact, replace printouts with digital files, and join a community saving hundreds of trees every day. Go paperless with our scanner app and earn eco certificates along the way.

Scan smarter—download iScanner now and join millions who have made it their go-to scanner app!

Visit our website to learn more:
Privacy Policy: https://iscanner.com/mobileapp/privacy/en/ 
Terms of Service: https://iscanner.com/mobileapp/terms/en/ 

We value your feedback! Let us know how we can improve our PDF scanner at iScanner Support: https://iscannerapp.com/scanner/support/

From employee tracking and order punching to distributor management and beat planning, Delta Sales App is your go-to sales team app and retail execution app for driving field performance.

✅ B2B Customer Order App  – Allow distributors, wholesalers, and retailers to place and track orders seamlessly.
✅ Distributor Management System (DMS) – Gain complete control over distributor stock, secondary sales, and order fulfillment.

👤 Who Should Use This App?

✔️ FMCG, CPG, and Pharma companies with large field sales teams
✔️ Paint, Cosmetic, Food, Beverage, Dairy, and Lubricant manufacturers
✔️ Distributors and B2B businesses with active field reps

title: Digistore24
description:
Digistore24 vendors and affiliates can use this app to keep track of their online business from anywhere at any time: The Digistore24 app offers full control over transactions, e-tickets, voucher codes, products and the marketplace, no matter where you are.

1. Keep track of all incoming payments
All of your incoming payments are clearly displayed in the app - broken down by days, months, quarters and years. The currency can be switched between EUR, USD and CHF. Ka-ching! Notifications of new incoming payments are sent directly via push notification. 
2. Manage transactions from anywhere
Do you have an urgent question about a transaction that just can’t wait until you’re in the office? It can be answered superfast: All transactions can be conveniently viewed in the app and filtered by order ID, product ID, product name, customer email, first and last name, payment method or currency. 
3. Switch effortlessly between accounts
It’s super easy to view all of your accounts in one place. In the app, you can switch between different accounts and the vendor or affiliate view with a single click. 
4. Monitor your analytics anytime 
Always be able to act: The integrated dashboards provide the perfect overview of all relevant key figures at all times. Depending on the account selected, they adapt automatically and always provide the latest data.
5. Ticketing made easy
Ticket scanning has never been easier: Digistore24 e-tickets can be scanned and recorded directly with the app. This means that every step can be taken care of with just one piece of software! Creating and selling tickets in the web application plus validation and admission control is easy using the app. 
6. Manage discount codes on the go
Want to run a spontaneous discount campaign? This can be implemented quickly, as all discounts can be created, edited, copied, deleted or searched for directly in the app.
7. Manage marketplace listings anytime
Stay on top of everything: Create or edit your product marketplace listings on the go, and as an affiliate, find the right products for your affiliate marketing while on the move.

Digistore24 is a European automation and affiliate marketing platform for digital products, seminars and software. All Digistore24 users use the app free of charge and are always well-informed about the online company.

title: Fareclock Time Clock
description:
Fareclock transforms and redefines how businesses manage attendance: seamlessly, efficiently, and confidently. With our comprehensive suite of tools and features, we promote honest timekeeping practices, streamline workforce and payroll management, and optimize productivity. 

With features like facial recognition, geofencing, smart scheduling, custom report fields, and powerful payroll calculation tools, we can empower your business functions through innovation that meets simplicity without sacrificing efficiency. 

Automate Timekeeping, Control Attendance!

Specialties/ Features: 
1.	Mobile Time Clock App - Group time clock kiosk and/or personal time clocks on workers' phones
2.	Time and attendance management software
3.	Time Card Automation 
4.	Attendance Compliance (Attendance Infractions)
5.	Workforce management - Real-time alert notifications, shift reminders, and custom worker announcement.
6.	Worker Multi-Shift scheduling - Calendar-based schedule, shift classes, breaks, and rounding rules
7.	Time Off Management and Accrual Tracking (Sick, Vacation, and Service Incentive)
8.	Payroll Calculator and Management - Overtime, pay wages and pay codes
9.	Payroll Integration with Accounting Software
10.	Facial Recognition Authentication 
11.	Geo-fencing, Geo-location tracking, and Breadcrumb navigation capabilities 
12.	Cloud-based technology
13.	Job Costing - Jobs, job categories, job phases, cost codes, and cost centers
14.	Customizable Reporting Formats - Custom fields for users and shifts, exportable to CSV, Excel, and PDF formats
15.	API Access for Custom Integrations - Synchronize with multiple online payroll and HR services

System Requirements:  Any Android device with a front-facing camera that runs Android version 4.1 or later. But Android 8+ to run the latest version of our app.

Note: This application requires you to have a Fareclock account. 

Support Email: support@fareclock.com

title: General Trade by FieldAssist
description:
FieldAssist is the market leading retail sales force transformation suite of applications which is used by 550+ CPG brands across India and the world to achieve business growth.

FieldAssist, assists CPG brands digitize and transform their end-to-end sales and distribution in three ways:

Enabling the management to strategize, plan and monitor their growth through Analytics Dashboard
Enabling the field force to book orders using the Sales Force Automation (SFA) application
Enabling the distributors to dispatch the orders through Distributor Management System (DMS) 

Each of these modules uses FieldAssist’s proprietary AI/ML based retail intelligence engine to deliver automation and intelligence for each of the stakeholders to truly transform the entire supply chain of CPG brands.

title: Jobber: Field Service Software
description: Jobber helps field service businesses schedule jobs, send invoices, and get paid faster. Whether you're in HVAC, cleaning, landscaping, or construction, our all-in-one field service software simplifies quoting, dispatching, invoicing, and payments—saving you time and helping your business succeed. Key Features ⚡ Quotes & Estimates – Win more jobs with fast, professional quotes that clients can approve online. Perfect for HVAC, cleaning, landscaping, and construction businesses looking to streamline job bidding. 📅 Smart Scheduling & Dispatch – Optimize work schedules, calendars, and dispatch jobs with real-time tracking. Manage your work schedule calendar efficiently from anywhere. 📊 Business Organization & Job Tracking – Manage client details, store job history, and organize business operations efficiently. 🧾 Invoice & Payment Processing—Send invoices instantly using our Invoice Maker, accept online payments, and effortlessly track transactions. Jobber is integrated with QuickBooks for seamless accounting. 🔔 Client Communication – Keep customers engaged and reduce missed appointments and overdue invoices. 🏗️ Construction & Field Service Software—Jobber is the go-to construction software for contractors, HVAC, roofing companies, handymen, and other home service professionals. Why Choose Jobber? 🔹 Save 7+ hours per week with streamlined workflows and smart automation. 🔹 Designed for 50+ service industries, including HVAC, cleaning, handyman, maid service, contractors, constructions, lawn care, landscaping, pool service, plumbing, roofing, and electrical services. 🔹250,000+ service pros trust Jobber to run their businesses. Whether you're a solo contractor or managing a team, Jobber helps you stay organized, get paid faster, and scale efficiently. 🔹 Built-in QuickBooks, Stripe, and business software integrations to keep everything organized. 📍 Start your free trial today and take your business to the next level! 📢 Download Jobber software to experience seamless scheduling, invoicing, and business management. Terms of Service: https://getjobber.com/terms-of-service/ Privacy Policy: https://getjobber.com/privacy-policy/

title: GigSmart Get Workers
description:
Take control of your staffing. Instant access to qualified workers on demand. Low cost, no contracts, no minimums, no risk.

The right people, right at your fingertips. With access to over 1 million Workers across an extensive range of industries and qualifications, the GigSmart platform provides the fastest, low-cost solution to connecting your business with qualified workers on demand.

EASILY STAFF UP WITH GET WORKERS
Whether you need to hire temporary workers on-demand or have open Full/Part-Time Positions, GigSmart provides real human support and a business model that aligns with your company’s unique requirements. Take the hassle and stress out of finding great workers - set the pay rates, handpick your workers, or let our hiring technology do the hard work for you.

Why GigSmart?
* Free to sign up and post - there are no contracts or commitments necessary in order to get started
* Only pay for success - fees are only charged when you get the Workers you need
* Industry-leading show and fill rate - 40% of Shifts are posted, worked, and paid on the same day

COMMUNICATE, TRACK, AND PAY
From the moment a worker accepts your Shift Gig to the minute it's completed, you can track the worker's status and pay them directly through the app.

For one of the lowest fees in the industry, you get:
* Fully dedicated Account Manager and Support Team
* 1-Hour Worker Quality Guarantee
* Background Checks, Motor Vehicle Record Checks, Drug Screenings
* Flexible Payment Options
* Top-of-the-line technology and automation for managing all your staffing needs
* Low Direct Hire Fee
* Lenient Cancellation Policy
* Comprehensive Insurance

See how easy it is to start sourcing Workeres for your next Shift by creating a free Get Workers account today!

title: hirist.tech: IT Job Search App
description:
hirist.tech is India’s only job search app built exclusively for technology professionals.  

Not for everyone. Deliberately so.  

What makes hirist.tech different?  

Most Tech & IT job search apps treat tech talent like a commodity. They flood your feed with noise, confuse volume for value, and leave you shifting through jobs you’d never consider.  

hirist.tech was built with a different belief, that techies, developers, coders and tech leaders of caliber deserve a job search app that respects their time, matches their expertise, and only surfaces tech & IT jobs worth a second look. 

Every job on hirist.tech is screened. 
Every company on hirist.tech means it.  

hirist.tech is where India’s best tech talent finds their next job 

85% of India’s startups hire on hirist.tech.  
Swiggy, Meesho, Zepto, Uber, Flipkart and many more. 

These aren’t companies filling seats. They’re companies building the future – and they come to hirist.tech to find the people who’ll help them do it.  

A job app that speaks your language 

hirist.tech understands tech the way a generic job search app never would.  
Your tech stack is your identity here.  
Java. Python. React. Node.js. Go. Rust. DevOps. AI/ML. Blockchain. AR/VR. VLSI. 
The hirist.tech job search algorithm doesn’t just match job titles – it matches depth, specificity, and seniority. So the tech & IT jobs you see aren’t close to what you do. They are what you do.  

Built for those who’ve outgrown the average 

- Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning
- Data Analytics & BI
- Data Engineering
- Backend Development
- Frontend Development
- Full Stack Development
- Mobile Applications
- Emerging Technologies
- DevOps / SRE
- CyberSecurity
- Qualitative Assurance
- Platform Engineering / SAP / Oracle 

Startup Tech & IT Jobs at India’s Most Ambitious Companies  

The best startup jobs in India don’t sit on generic portals. They come to hirist.tech, because founders and CTOs know this is where serious tech talent looks.  

From Series A startups to publicly listed unicorns, hirist.tech carries startup jobs across every stage of growth, so your ambition has somewhere worthy to land.  

Tech & IT Jobs in Bangalore and Beyond 

hirist.tech has the deepest concentration of tech jobs in Bangalore – India's silicon capital and home to the roles that define careers.  

Beyond Jobs in Bangalore: Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Hyderabad, Chennai, Pune, Gurugram, Noida, Kolkata, Ahmedabad and remote tech & IT jobs across India.  

Whether you’re rooted in the Bangalore tech ecosystems or open to where the best opportunity takes you, hirist.tech is THE tech job search app for you.  

Features that work as hard as you do 

PRECISION JOB FEED 
Define your stack, your seniority, your city. The hirist.tech job search shows you what belongs in your feed; nothing more, nothing less.  

EARLY APPLICANT ADVANTAGE 
When a job goes live on hirist.tech, you know first. Being early on the right job changes outcomes.  

IN-APP RESUME BUILDER 
Build a recruiter-ready resume directly in the hirist.tech app. No detours, no third-party tools. 

REAL-TIME APPLICATION TRACKING 
Applied to a job? Watch it move. Know exactly when your application is seen, reviewed, or shortlisted, in real time.  

DIRECT RECRUITER ACCESS
The best opportunities on hirist.tech don’t always come through search. Senior recruiters use hirist.tech to reach out to job seekers even when they aren’t actively looking. Your profile can work while you aren’t.  

4 MILLION+ TECH PROFESSIONALS. ONE CLEAR STANDARD. 

hirist.tech is not the largest tech job app. It is the most respected.  

Because the techies who use hirist.tech aren’t chasing just any job. They’re making deliberate moves.  

Download hirist.tech. 

The jobs here are waiting for someone like you.

title: Cvent iCapture
description:
Designed to quickly snap a photo of a business card or scan barcodes on a trade show badge, iCapture PowerScan is the perfect solution to your data capture needs.

Ideal for trade shows, conferences, events or anywhere you need to be mobile... an Internet Connection IS NOT REQUIRED!

Discover how iCapture can turn your mobile device into a magnet for new leads and automatically send those emails directly to your favorite Email or CRM system with the touch of a button.

NOTE: An iCapture Power Plan subscription is required to utilize the functionality in this app.

HOW IT WORKS

* SETUP * - Sign up for an iCapture account online and create a questionnaire with our quick and easy web-based admin.  Upload your logo in seconds and proudly display your brand on the screen. Install on your tablet or smartphone.
* CAPTURE * - Works on your phone or tablet... with or without an Internet Connection.
* RETRIEVE * - export your data to a spreadsheet via our secure web-based admin.

PUT AUTOMATION TO WORK FOR YOU

** Scan Barcodes / QR Codes -- use the camera on your phone or tablet to instantly scan barcodes of all types

** Snap Photos of Business Cards -- capture a picture of a business card and you're done.

** Send Auto-Reply Emails -- say “Thank You” or automatically deliver requested information.

** Sync to your Email Provider -- Constant Contact, MailChimp, iContact, AWeber and more.

** Sync to your CRM -- Salesforce.com, SugarCRM, Microsoft Dynamics and more.

** Sync to your Database -- MySQL, SQL Server


WHERE CAN YOU iCAPTURE?

** Trade Shows - Exhibitions
** Retail - Showroom - Point-of-Sale - Kiosks
** Outdoor Events - Concerts - Fairs
** Mobile Sales Teams
** Events - Conferences


TOP 10 - MOST POPULAR FEATURES

1. Auto-Reply Emails
2. No Internet Required
3. Branded with your Logo
4. Email / CRM Integrations
5. Kiosk Mode
 » Lock your tablet and leave it unattended.  Your questionnaire will loop over and over.
6. Pick-A-Winner
 » Randomly select a winner from all your captures (across multiple devices)
7. Quick Entry Screens
 » Custom-built Screens for Email, Phone, Numbers, etc. allow for rapid data entry.
8. “HOT LEAD” Questions
 » Copy proven question templates that help you uncover who’s HOT and who’s NOT
9. Skip Logic
 » Easily show or hide questions based on previous answers
10. Transferable Licenses
 » Need to use iCapture on a different device?  Simply delete from one device and install on another.


POWERFUL INTEGRATIONS

After your data is captured, iCapture can automatically send your data to the following platforms:

** Constant Contact
** Salesforce.com
** Infusionsoft
** MailChimp
** iContact
** AWeber
** ExactTarget
** ... and many more!

title: Intellifluence
description:
Intellifluence for Influencers enables you to earn free products or cash in exchange for your honest reviews! Create your free account within our influencer marketing app (or log in if you are an existing influencer) and get immediate access to the Marketplace where you can apply for awesome offers from Brands.

How it works:
1. Sign up within the app as an Influencer for free (or log in)
2. Access the Marketplace to browse offers from Brands and apply
3. Upon pitch acceptance, complete transactions and earn free products and/or cash!

As an Influencer, there are never any fees associated with using our influencer marketing service and you get to keep all your earnings!

All cash payouts are handled by Intellifluence Payments and are backed by “The Intellifluence Promise,” which ensures you are securely paid for your work.

Our app for influencers brings most of the functionality of our desktop app to your mobile device, so you can complete your influencer marketing transactions anywhere, with ease, from a phone or tablet! With the Intellifluence for Influencers app, you are able to:

- Keep track of your progress with your custom dashboard
- Manage every step of your transactions with ease
- Browse Marketplace offers and apply to your favorites
- View and accept pitches from Brands
- Communicate with Brands using our Messaging tool
- View your Earnings Summary
- Earn Badges for completing transactions
- Manage and update your Influencer profile at any time
- Access helpful Intellifluence Knowledge Base articles and contact Customer Service if you need help

Intellifluence is the largest warm influencer marketing platform in the world, which means each one of our influencers has enthusiastically signed up on their own, just like you! 

Learn more and join for free: https://intellifluence.com/influencers

In case you were wondering, our influencers love us:

"I’ve created so many “extra paydays” for myself using Intellifluence, that I’ve lost count!"
 - Laura Pence Atencio, Podcast Host

“I love working with a company that can connect me with brands that match my interests and allow me to build my following. It’s easier than ever now to be a mom blogger or influencer with companies like Intellifluence.”
- Elizabeth Heath, Lifestyle blogger

“Intellifluence makes sponsorships a breeze! It helps me keep organized with the companies I’m working with and offers some neat brands. I love the products I’ve discovered through the platform and have incorporated some into my daily life."
- Jenna Citrus, Photographic Based Designer

In the Media:

“[Intellifluence] brings order to the chaos.”
- Shanebarker.com

4 stars
- Influencer Marketing Hub

If you ever have questions, encounter an issue or want to share a feature request, please e-mail us at support@intellifluence.com

title: BusinessCards
description:
Create, share, and manage your digital business card — with BusinessCards by snapAddy. Use it on your phone, in the browser, or via QR code. Perfect for trade shows, meetings, and daily business.

Scan paper cards in over 40 languages with AI support. Share your own card via Wallet, link, QR or NFC — always up to date and GDPR-compliant. Made in Germany.

Why BusinessCards?

• Create your own digital business card in seconds  
• Share contacts via QR code, Wallet, link or NFC  
• Scan business cards in 40+ languages (AI-powered)  
• CRM & Excel export with duplicate check *(Pro version)*  
• GDPR-compliant hosting in Germany  
• Add notes & attachments to contacts  
• Corporate branding included *(Pro version)*

How to use BusinessCards:

Without an account:  
Scan up to 20 cards per day — no login required.

With a free account:  
Scan, create your own business card & share via QR or Wallet.

With BusinessCards Pro:  
Unlimited use, central management, CRM integration & branding — ideal for teams.

Digital. Simple. Always ready.  
BusinessCards replaces paper clutter with lasting connections.

title: Access PeopleHR
description:
Engage your entire workforce with our People HR App.  

Our mobile app gives you easy access to the PeopleHR system with Face ID and fingerprint login allowing your employees the ability to self-serve. 

Some of our key features include: 
- Tap in/Out using GPS & proximity beacons 
- Notifications – Making sure you receive important updates in real-time  
- Chat function – So you can connect with your colleagues  
- Approvals – Make quick decisions on approval requests 
- Planner - See who is working and when
- News - Keep up-to-date with your company news
- Documents - View, download, and sign on the go
- Managing Logbooks
- Automation - Complete interactive ripples and tasks seamlessly  

And more!

title: Mailchimp Email Marketing
description:
Get more opens, clicks, and sales with the #1 email marketing and automation platform*

Intuit Mailchimp's mobile app can help you market smarter and grow your business faster from day one. With Mailchimp, you'll never miss an opportunity to make a sale, bring customers back, find new subscribers, or share your brand's mission.

Marketing CRM and Inbox -
Engage with your customers, grow your audience, and build relationships.
Add contacts from your device, scan business cards, or import them from files on your phone, Google Drive, or Dropbox.
Track audience growth and view insights about individual contacts.
Call, text, and email directly from the app to keep track of communication. Record notes and add tags after every interaction to remember the important details.

Reports & Analytics -
Track results for all of your campaigns and get quick actionable recommendations on how to improve.
View analytics for email campaigns, landing pages, social posts, SMS, automations, and surveys.
Gain a deeper understanding of your customers so you can target and personalize your campaigns, using analytics such as: opens, clicks, devices, and more.

Emails & Automations -
Create, edit and send email marketing campaigns, newsletters, and automations.
With one-click Resend to Non-Openers, new subscribers, or non-purchasers shortcuts, you'll be able to re-engage customers and grow sales in no time.
Abandoned Cart Automations - Remind customers of products they’ve left behind and recapture lost sales.

Timely Notifications and Insights -
Anomaly detection notifications with insights and next steps to improve marketing performance.
Non-opener insight notifications with auto-campaign replication to increase engagement.
New subscriber notifications and sales summaries to celebrate audience and revenue growth.
New inbox messages so you don’t miss any important communication from your contacts.

About Intuit Mailchimp:
Intuit Mailchimp is an email and marketing automation platform for growing businesses. We empower millions of customers around the world to start and grow their businesses with world-class marketing technology, award-winning customer support, and inspiring content. Mailchimp puts data-backed recommendations at the heart of your marketing, so you can find and engage customers across email, social media, landing pages, and advertising—automatically and with the power of AI.

If you enjoy using Mailchimp or have a great idea you’d like to share with us, please leave a review.

*Disclosures
#1 email marketing platform: Based on December 2023 publicly available data on competitors' number of customers.

Availability of features and functionality varies by plan type. For details, please view Mailchimp's various plans and pricing. Terms, conditions, pricing, special features, and service and support options subject to change without notice.

title: Markate : Service Ops Platform
description: Markate is the Service Operations Platform that helps contractors and service businesses run their entire operation from one system. Markate is a powerful field service CRM, scheduling, dispatch, and invoicing platform designed for contractors and modern service businesses. From the first customer lead to the final payment, Markate connects every part of your service business into one platform. Manage customers, create estimates, schedule jobs, dispatch technicians, track field activity, send invoices, and grow your business — all from your phone or desktop. Markate is trusted by contractors, field service professionals, and growing service teams who want a modern and professional way to manage their operations. Run Your Entire Service Business on One Platform Markate helps service businesses manage: • Customers and communication • Estimates and pricing • Scheduling and dispatch • Field technicians and routes • Work orders and job tracking • Invoices and payments • Marketing and customer engagement • Business insights and reporting Platform Features Customer Operations Manage customers with CRM, service history, contacts, and communication tools. Sales Operations Create quotes, estimates, pricing lists, and approvals. Job Operations Schedule jobs, manage work orders, recurring services, and dispatch technicians easily. Fleet & Field Operations Route planning, technician location tracking, GPS maps, and field updates. Financial Operations Invoices, payments, accounting sync, expense tracking, and reporting. Growth Operations Marketing automation, reminders, online booking, and customer engagement tools. Tools for Field Teams • Create invoices, estimates, and schedules from the field • Automated appointment reminders via SMS and email • Capture before-and-after job photos • Customer signatures and secure credit card payments • Work order notifications for technicians • GPS navigation with Google Maps • Mileage and expense tracking Built for Contractors and Service Businesses Markate helps contractors run their business efficiently without juggling multiple tools. Manage your entire operation from one intuitive platform — whether you're in the office or in the field. Start your 14-day free trial and see how Markate transforms the way you run your service business. Integrations & Support • QuickBooks integration • Business insights and dashboards • Phone, email, and live chat support Join Thousands of Service Businesses Using Markate Download the app today and start running your entire service operation on one platform. Contact: support@markate.com Visit: https://www.markate.com

title: Method CRM
description:
Method:CRM is the #1 CRM for growing businesses that use QuickBooks. Use this app to close deals faster, maximize your productivity, and keep your customers happy — no matter where your day takes you.


Here are the key benefits of the Method Android app.


#1 Give every lead the attention needed to close the sale.
• Instantly assign a sales rep to each new lead to kickstart your nurture efforts.
• Stop deals from slipping through the cracks with seamless opportunity management.
• Convert leads to QuickBooks customers with the click of a button.


#2 Bring revenue in faster with a streamlined sales process.
• Empower your sales reps to create sales and purchase transactions without QuickBooks access.
• Get paid sooner with easy online payment options for your customers.
• Sync data between Method:CRM and QuickBooks in real-time for seamless accounting.

#3 Drive more repeat business with excellent customer service.
• Gain a 360-degree of every customer from their purchase history to recent interactions with your team.
• Schedule automatic reminders to follow up with your customers and leads.
• Send individual or mass emails directly from Method:CRM.

#4 Finally, a CRM that meets your every need.
• Customize your Method:CRM account, so it’s perfect for your business.
• Create workflow automation that mirrors your exact processes and saves you time.
• Get data-driven insights from custom fields and personalized reports.

title: mHelpDesk
description: Work online or offline With our innovative offline feature, your team can continue to work even when a wifi or cell signal isn’t available. Then the app automatically syncs as soon as a connection is found. Simplified scheduling Check your own schedule or your team’s schedule, and create new jobs and appointments directly within the app. Sync our mHelpDesk schedule with Google Calendar for extra efficiency. Professional estimates, on site Create and send estimates on the go, using professional templates that you’ve selected and customized. When the work is done, you can turn the estimate into an invoice with a few button clicks. Invoices that get paid faster View or email professional-looking invoices directly from your phone, allowing you to take payment immediately. Customer support, made easy By keeping all of your lead, customer, and job details within the app, your team always has the information they need. And with our automated email and SMS (text) alerts, team members and customers can always have the latest information on job status. Connecting field and office With our robust app, communication between office and field techs is seamless. Data is updated automatically so that everyone is on the same page. mHelpDesk saves you time and energy in connecting field and office staff so that everyone can focus on job quality and customer service. Over 12,000 customers use mHelpDesk to run their business more efficiently. "We now convert more leads into paying jobs. The professional quotes included are so much better than our old carbon copies." - Nancy S. (Owner @ Vantage Landscaping) "We have been using mHelpDesk for 2 years and it's really helped my company get organized. We've now adopted the software across the company from sales to engineers and it’s improving our efficiency all the time." - Lisa T. (Owner @ Appliance Rescue) "With mHelpDesk I enter the work once and I'm done. Even better, I can have clients pay me on the spot." - Derek K. (Director @ Kite Refrigeration) Everything you need to get the job done - Web and mobile access - Offline/online sync - Scheduling - Lead management - Job management - Email/SMS (text) Automation - Estimates - Invoices - QuickBooks integration mHelpDesk has happy customers across several industries, including: - HVAC - General contractors - Electricians - Plumbers - Handymen - Exterminators - Locksmiths - Roofers - Installers - Repairmen - AND MORE Getting started If you’re already an mHelpDesk customer, then download the app for FREE and sign in with your account credentials. Not an mHelpDesk customer yet? Create your free trial at mhelpdesk.com and try it free for 14 days. No credit card is required, and you have no obligation to purchase. About us For 10+ years, mHelpDesk has been developing products entirely focused on field service businesses. Our mission is to help our customers simplify and streamline those necessary manual office tasks so they can spend more time on their customers and craft. Disclaimer: mHelpDesk uses your GPS in your phone - continued use of GPS running in the background can decrease battery life.
short_description: The Fastest, Easiest, Most Powerful Field Service Management Software
text:
mHelpDesk The Fastest, Easiest, Most Powerful Field Service Management Software Work online or offline
With our innovative offline feature, your team can continue to work even when a wifi or cell signal isn’t available. Then the app automatically syncs as soon as a connection is found.

Simplified scheduling
Check your own schedule or your team’s schedule, and create new jobs and appointments directly within the app. Sync our mHelpDesk schedule with Google Calendar for extra efficiency.

Professional estimates, on site
Create and send estimates on the go, using professional templates that you’ve selected and customized. When the work is done, you can turn the estimate into an invoice with a few button clicks.

Invoices that get paid faster
View or email professional-looking invoices directly from your phone, allowing you to take payment immediately.

Customer support, made easy
By keeping all of your lead, customer, and job details within the app, your team always has the information they need. And with our automated email and SMS (text) alerts, team members and customers can always have the latest information on job status.

Connecting field and office
With our robust app, communication between office and field techs is seamless. Data is updated automatically so that everyone is on the same page. mHelpDesk saves you time and energy in connecting field and office staff so that everyone can focus on job quality and customer service.

Over 12,000 customers use mHelpDesk to run their business more efficiently.

"We now convert more leads into paying jobs. The professional quotes included are so much better than our old 
carbon copies." - Nancy S. (Owner @ Vantage Landscaping)

title: TRANSFLO Mobile+
description:
Transflo® Mobile+ is a complete trucking solution rolled into one convenient mobile app. It starts with the on-the-go scanning solutions you need with the fastest document delivery available. Plus we’ve added in the features you need like accident and OS&D submission, load review and acceptance, integrated navigation (CoPilot) designed specifically for trucking routes, weigh station bypass technology (Drivewyze), two-way messaging with your fleet or broker and fuel finder perks like myPilot and Love’s Connect. 
Our integrated navigation (powered by CoPilot Truck Navigation) works 24 hours a day and is designed specifically for trucks. Our navigation software takes into account the dimensions of each truck (for preventing accidents), driver fuel needs and trucker-friendly rest areas – all while offering users real-time traffic, PC*Miler trusted route options, and full GPS map access even if data signal is lost.
Transflo® Mobile+ is proud to offer the easiest and most advanced weigh station bypass solution in the industry. Powered by Drivewyze, our bypass feature uses geo-fencing technology that notifies drivers when they are within two miles of a designated weigh station. That means no stopping, no wasting time and no unnecessary fees for safe drivers. 
For when you do need to weigh, save time with the new Weigh My Truck features (through CAT Scale®) without ever leaving the Transflo® Mobile+ app. This integration allows commercial drivers to weigh their trucks at over 1,800 locations throughout the U.S. and Canada. 
With Transflo® Mobile+ you’ll get notifications when there are available loads. Just accept or decline them right on your smartphone or tablet! With a simple swipe, drivers can also let their carriers or brokers know which leg of the trip they’re on. We've included the ability to view both destinations on the map and truck stops along the way to better help drivers plan their day. 
Transflo® Mobile+ can be used by drivers to send paperwork, and photos for accidents and OS&D, to carriers. We’ll walk you through the process with necessary data input and allow you to take photos or upload existing photos for your accident or OS&D submissions. After submitting documents for accidents or OS&D, a unique confirmation number and email notification is generated allowing images to be viewed for up to 14 days.
Note: Your fleet or broker must be authorized to use Transflo® Mobile+ for you to access these features. Registration follows the same process as Transflo® Mobile+. You will need a Fleet or Broker ID. A Fleet ID can be obtained from your driver manager or office personnel. Carriers will be provided with a Broker ID from an authorized broker or from Pegasus TransTech.
Transflo® Mobile+ supports Driver Hours of Service when using a Transflo® T7 ELD device. With an HOS feature the app will automatically switch a driver to ON DUTY DRIVING mode when detecting a driving pattern (12mph for 5 seconds or more) and back to ON DUTY NOT DRIVING when detecting driving has stopped for at least 5 minutes.
Transflo® image optimization improves legibility even for carbon-copied documents, and documents with light gray text on a color background (blue, yellow, green, pink, etc.) 

©2018 Transflo®, a Pegasus TransTech company. All rights reserved. Transflo® and the Transflo® logo are trademarks of Pegasus TransTech, LLC

title: YouCam for Business – In-store
description:
Grow your sales and power beauty retail with a magic makeup mirror using cutting-edge AR & AI beauty tech
YouCam for Business supports the makeup industry by letting customers try on professional-quality looks and styles from top cosmetic brands in real time. With our in-store kiosk and streamlined Content Management System, YouCam for Business puts your brand at an advantage with an array of tools to help customers and boost sales. 

Use augmented reality to showcase makeup, hair colors and makeovers so your customers can try before they buy. Display new looks with unparalleled AR and AI powered skin analysis, and 360-degree hair coloring, providing a personalized makeover for all skin tones.
 
YouCam for Business will feature virtual makeup from your brand so you can display your products with professional results. Manage your beauty services with AR and AI to see what a difference it makes.

Benefits of using YouCam for Business include: 
 
◆Easy setup in-store magic makeup mirror
With our in-store kiosk, use augmented reality to test and demonstrate different brands, shades and styles in real time. In addition, the magic makeup mirror creates a convenient setup for your business - it saves time for your customers, and there’s no need to worry about running out of products. Using the makeup mirror also eliminates any sanitation and health risks that come with cosmetic sampling. 

Bring makeup looks to life from photos with AR and AI technology. Whether you need matte, metallic or shimmer, there are a variety of textures to choose from. 360° Live Hair Color Tryout acts as an in-store virtual salon - the colors are true-to-life, so customers can be sure of the products they purchase. 

◆Full CMS console for managing store and products
Access all your brand data and monitor customer behavior with our integrated CMS. Upload and manage all aspects of your brand product data for in-store consultation mode, including makeup looks, products, and more. Moreover, track, analyze and manage customer engagement with in-depth user trial data and statistics. 

◆Digital Beauty Trial Solutions for Retailers
Turn your brand into a smart digital retailer with the latest AR & AI beauty tech. Help your customers more efficiently with finding the right makeup and hair color by purchasing the products directly from the in-store magic makeup mirror.

◆Grow Sales with AR Beauty Tech
The magic makeup mirror is a key tool for a higher ROI. Increase brand basket size and reduce customer wait time - the more the customers try, the more they buy. Seamless integration of product information and trial data allows for later purchase online or offline, effortlessly monetizing the retail experience. Manage your beauty services with flawless augmented reality makeup and artificial intelligence. 
Manage your beauty services with seamless augmented reality makeup and artificial intelligence. Download YouCam for Business today!

Interested in becoming a smart beauty retailer? To use YouCam for Business, you first need to have a Customer ID from any of our AI/AR services. For more information, contact us via the email provided below. 

Email: YouCam_Business@perfectcorp.com
Privacy Policy: https://www.perfectcorp.com/stat/ymkbusiness/enu/privacy.html

title: Autodesk Construction Cloud
description: The best-in-class construction management app for Autodesk Build, Autodesk BIM Collaborate, Autodesk Docs and PlanGrid that makes it easy for teams on more than 2.5 million projects to manage their construction projects. Construction teams leverage Autodesk Construction Cloud’s simple automation, smart connections between tools, and comprehensive workflows to deliver quality construction projects on time and under budget. The Autodesk Construction Cloud mobile app brings Autodesk Build, Autodesk BIM Collaborate, Autodesk Docs, Revit, Navisworks, PlanGrid and AutoCAD to the field with construction and document management, collaboration tools, and project data available from anywhere. Autodesk Construction Cloud is made for the project team, like… • the superintendent managing quality on site • the project manager tracking progress in real-time • the BIM team identifying issues ahead of installation • the architect on a site walk • and the owner leveraging construction data and as-builts to improve daily operations Here’s how we do it. CONSTRUCTION COLLABORATION + Issues Track issues, from design to handover, all in one place. Resolve issues faster by adding due dates, responsible parties, and easily reference photos, associated files, and RFIs. + Schedule Keep projects on track with a centralized schedule. View the schedule by different timespans or filter by critical items, review dependencies, and assess schedule suggestions. + Forms Gather critical information with forms that adapt to project requirements. Build a comprehensive safety program or track daily checklists. + Assets Easily manage the lifecycle of project assets from design through commissioning and handover. Assets are tracked, stored, and connected to other workflows. + Meeting Minutes Stay ahead of the next meeting by creating meetings and agendas. Link references like issues, models, RFIs or photos. Check on outstanding items and follow up, all from the field. FILE MANAGEMENT + Sheets and Drawings Quickly access the latest drawings and shared plans with quick downloads and dynamic search. Compare, share, and markup sheets directly from the field to take the guesswork out of installation. + Models Make critical decisions faster with access to 3D models in the field. View installation details and effortlessly navigate single or multi-trade models to build with confidence. Supports Revit and AutoCAD file types and many more including RVT, DWG, NWC, IFC, NWD. QUALITY CONTROL + RFIs Reduce the risk of data loss with seamless RFI management. Connect RFIs across the project lifecycle to cut down on duplicate work. + Submittals Keep all relevant submittal information on hand. With search, quickly find the necessary submittal to view progress and next steps. + Photos Use photos to track progress and add references to issues, RFIs, schedule activities, and more. With autotags and filters, quickly find the photo you need. See what our customers say: “The ability to access 3D models from the field eliminates confusion and allows us to come to a real-time resolution for any issues onsite. This capability reduces risk and provides cost and time savings while ensuring we deliver high-quality projects to our clients.” Briana Mitchell, Project Manager, Boldt Company “We have about 460 field employees and for them to access documents in real-time directly on their iPhone or their iPad is priceless.” Ken Mabe, Director of Field Operations, Eckardt Group “I’m excited about being able to effortlessly tag a snippet from a drawing onto an RFI and immediately assign responsibilities and track how the project team interacts with a particular issue or RFI. The ability to track an issue’s progression in real-time helps us manage any roadblocks immediately.” Amy Kozlowski, Project Manager, Herrero Builders

Quickly access the latest drawings and shared plans with quick downloads and dynamic search. Compare, share, and markup sheets directly from the field to take the guesswork out of installation.

+ Models
Make critical decisions faster with access to 3D models in the field. View installation details and effortlessly navigate single or multi-trade models to build with confidence. Supports Revit and AutoCAD file types and many more including RVT, DWG, NWC, IFC, NWD.

QUALITY CONTROL
+ RFIs
Reduce the risk of data loss with seamless RFI management. Connect RFIs across the project lifecycle to cut down on duplicate work.

+ Submittals
Keep all relevant submittal information on hand. With search, quickly find the necessary submittal to view progress and next steps.

+ Photos
Use photos to track progress and add references to issues, RFIs, schedule activities, and more. With autotags and filters, quickly find the photo you need.

See what our customers say:

“The ability to access 3D models from the field eliminates confusion and allows us to come to a real-time resolution for any issues onsite. This capability reduces risk and provides cost and time savings while ensuring we deliver high-quality projects to our clients.”
Briana Mitchell, Project Manager, Boldt Company

“We have about 460 field employees and for them to access documents in real-time directly on their iPhone or their iPad is priceless.”
Ken Mabe, Director of Field Operations, Eckardt Group

“I’m excited about being able to effortlessly tag a snippet from a drawing onto an RFI and immediately assign responsibilities and track how the project team interacts with a particular issue or RFI. The ability to track an issue’s progression in real-time helps us manage any roadblocks immediately.”
Amy Kozlowski, Project Manager, Herrero Builders

title: Procurify
description:
Procurify is the AI-enhanced procurement and AP automation platform for the mid-market. We make it easy for organizations to take control of spend and save money. Procurify offers the most complete procure-to-pay system, seamlessly integrating purchase requests, approvals, expenses, purchase orders, contracts, vendors, budgets, receiving, invoicing, bill payments, spending cards, and more.

Named the #1 Mid-Market Purchasing Software by G2, Procurify is trusted by hundreds of customers worldwide to manage over $30 billion USD of organizational spend. We integrate with major ERP accounting systems such as NetSuite, Sage Intacct, Microsoft Dynamics 365, and QuickBooks Online to provide customers with real-time visibility into the most accurate and complete spend data.

What our customers say: “We were able to get our requisition cycle time down from about twenty-nine days down to one day. That’s 96% faster which is a monumental improvement from our previous processes.” - Skye Durant, Director of Procurement at Canal Barge

Why Procurify?

- Eliminate rogue spending and encourage budget discipline with flexible spend controls
- Streamline communication and empower decision-making with a complete picture of every purchase transaction
- Improve your bottom line with spend insights and real-time budget visibility on desktop and mobile
- Remove purchasing bottlenecks and speed up purchase cycle times with configurable workflows and automation
- Integrate seamlessly with your accounting system or ERP to automate the data workflows between finance and procurement.

For more information, visit www.procurify.com.

title: Fulcrum GIS field data capture
description: Field teams often struggle with inefficient tools that slow operations and compromise data accuracy. Fulcrum transforms field workflows with intuitive, AI-powered mobile GIS software for seamless data collection, geospatial mobile apps tracking, and process automation. Unlike traditional GIS mobile apps that require specialized training and are confined to the office, Fulcrum is a field-first solution that empowers both GIS experts and non-GIS team members to easily capture and share geospatial data. Fulcrum is built for teams that need powerful, flexible tools for field data collection, asset tracking, and process automation. It provides: - Field process management with real-time GIS mobile data collection for faster, more accurate data capture. - Mobile data collection applications to streamline surveys, inspections, and compliance tracking. - Asset data collection software mobile applications to track and manage infrastructure, utilities, and field equipment with precision. - Geospatial mobile apps for GPS-based field data collection to give teams accurate location data for mapping, reporting, and decision-making. Why choose Fulcrum? Fulcrum is trusted by nearly 3,000 companies and 50,000+ users worldwide to digitize inspections, surveys, field data collection, and asset management tasks for industries such as construction, utilities, and environmental services. As an Esri Silver Partner, Fulcrum integrates seamlessly with ArcGIS, helping teams connect field data with their GIS workflows. And as a purpose-built field processes platform, Fulcrum helps teams customize field processes, reduce manual workflows, and capture more accurate, actionable data. Key features - Drag-and-drop form builder – Create and customize inspection checklists, surveys, and asset tracking forms with no coding required. - AI-powered voice data entry – Use Audio FastFill for hands-free data collection, reducing manual input and speeding up fieldwork. - Integrated GIS capabilities – Sync with Esri ArcGIS, export geospatial data in GeoJSON or Shapefiles, and enhance mobile GIS data collection. - Real-time data sync – Instantly share collected data with your team and integrate with enterprise systems. - Offline data collection – Capture and store data without connectivity, then sync once back online. - Advanced security – Protect sensitive data with SOC 2 Type 2 compliance, SSO, SCIM to ease onboarding, and customizable user roles. - Native mobile apps – Access full functionality on Android, built for serious field use. - Dedicated support – Get expert help via email, chat, or phone.. Built for the industries that rely on field data Fulcrum’s field-first design makes it the best app for land survey, field inspection, and asset management workflows. Teams across construction, utilities, and environmental services and more use Fulcrum to streamline field workflows and improve data accuracy. Industries and use cases include: - Land surveying & field inspections – Use Fulcrum GPS data collection software to capture precise location data and sync in real time. - Utility & infrastructure management – Improve asset tracking and maintenance with GIS mobile data collection and automated reporting. - Environmental monitoring & compliance – Conduct site assessments, collect location-based data, and generate reports with user-friendly GIS cloud mobile data collection apps. - Construction & engineering projects – Manage site audits, inspections, and progress tracking using mobile data collection applications designed for the field. Download now to create your own GIS mobile app and streamline field data collection and process management with Fulcrum. Privacy Policy https://www.fulcrumapp.com/privacy Terms of Service https://www.fulcrumapp.com/terms-of-service

title: Capture Mobile
description:
The Capture Mobile is a Secure Messaging Android App which offers compliance, branding and employee autonomy. The App serves both as a secure business messaging app built for organizations with security and privacy in mind and as a separate enterprise and personal messaging App on a single enterprise or BYOD device, where users have an app associated with an enterprise number and archive all work-related SMS/MMS chats, while tracking when messages are sent, delivered, read and answered.
 
With the Capture Mobile secure texting platform, organizations can manage mobile messaging, secure communications, enforce policies and ensure reliable enterprise communication.
 
Businesses can optimize their secure text messaging experience with our user-friendly app, our web portal, Email to SMS plug-ins and messaging APIs that integrate with your existing CRM, ERP or any other system that you use.
The Secure Messaging App offers encrypted messaging from end-to-end, in transit and in rest, keeping your data secure. It also offers:
* PIN Code Protection – lock the application on your mobile device with a PIN code so that only you have access to the application.
* Message Self-Destruct – messages can be configured to be automatically deleted after a certain period of time.
* Group Messaging – create groups and interact with multiple co-workers, making business messages and communication safe, secure and private.
* Advanced Delivery Notifications – know whether the message has been sent, delivered, read or expired.
* Fallback to SMS – any messages not delivered via the Internet are sent as a standard SMS message.
* Files & Attachments – you can send pictures, videos, documents, audio files & even location.
* Automation APIs – integrate your current IT systems with TeleMessage using our APIs including REST, SOAP, XML, HTTP and & more.
 
Enterprise Number Archiver features include:

• Get a 2nd phone number on your iPhone

• Text and call any phone number or other app users

• Record and archive all SMS/MMS text messages, Call logs or Call recordings

• Visual voice mail for recording and missed calls

• Search, track, and retrieve messages and mobile communication
• Deposit mobile messages with any email archiving vendor

• Enjoy secure co-worker messaging, group chat, calls

• Use from: Web, Mobile, and APIs for broadcast & emergency alerts

• Full administration and reporting



The Enterprise Number Archiver is a solution:

• Communicating with partners, customers, patients, etc.

• Manage, control, archive, and secure your internal messaging traffic like email

• Supporting international numbers and locations; Corp and BYOD ownership

• Archive mobile communication onsite or with leading archiving and compliance vendors

title: Trane BAS Operator
description:
Check your building’s HVAC system to see the status, make adjustments, respond to hot/cold calls quickly and get more done in your day.
The Tracer BAS Operator works with the Trane building automation system controller: Tracer SC version 3.6 and higher. The BAS Operator is fully integrated with Tracer SC – just log in to view your building!
The Trane BAS Operator Features:
Manage Alarms
• See the active and historic alarms in your system, their severity and what generated the alarms.
• Acknowledge new alarms and add comments for others to see
• Keep the alarm log tidy with the delete alarm functionality
View Status
• See what’s happening in spaces, with equipment and entire systems.
• Built-in graphics for easy to read status, at a glance, including animations.
Take Action
• Respond to hot/cold calls by adjusting setpoints, overriding equipment and occupancy.

A feature of BAS Operator is it remembers the connection information for your connected devices. This is very helpful! However, when Updating to a new version, do not Un-install (or delete) the old version. Doing so will erase the device connection data.

title: Wantedly People scan biz cards
description:
Even with 100 cards, you'd only need 5 minutes, because this speedy app scans 10 at a time. Scatter out your cards, tap a button, and watch them transform into digital contacts. 
Spend less time organizing and start a conversation right away.

----------

How you can organize your network and achieve more:

- Scan up to 10 business cards at once
No other app scans multiple cards at once, in any way you scatter them. Wantedly People captures them all in a matter of seconds. 

- Turn physical cards into phone contacts
Let the app do the hard work for you. OCR (optical character recognition) detects and analyzes text on cards to instantly create new contacts. Powered by AI (artificial intelligence), the app improves in accuracy with each card it scans. 

- Express yourself through a full professional profile
You’re more than what your card says. Say what you can’t fit in those few square inches through a Wantedly profile complete with a self introduction, work history, education, achievements, projects, social media links, and more.

- Search contacts by name, as well as company and job position
So no worries if you forgot someone's name.

- Call and email contacts
Just tap and go.

- Send instant messages to contacts
Message with Wantedly's agile business chat platform, Wantedly Chat.

- Share and swap business cards with others online
Share a card over chat or email with a temporary URL. It'll expire after a set amount of time to protect privacy.

----------

About Wantedly:

A world in which work meets passion. Wantedly is a professional social network that aims to create that world. By connecting people based on visions instead of salaries, Wantedly helps 1,000,000+ people find just the right place, and 18,000+ companies find just the right talent.
Learn more: https://www.wantedly.com

----------

About Wantedly Chat:

A business chat platform to empower your team to communicate and achieve at record speed—for free.
No more emails. No more lost messages. No more unnecessary meetings.
With an intuitive interface and powerful features, Wantedly Chat enables over 18,000 companies to spend time on what's important.

----------

short_description:
Scan up to 10 business cards in a flash. Organize cards 
into contacts with AI.
text:
Wantedly People scan biz cards Scan up to 10 business cards in a flash. Organize cards 
into contacts with AI. Even with 100 cards, you'd only need 5 minutes, because this speedy app scans 10 at a time. Scatter out your cards, tap a button, and watch them transform into digital contacts. 
Spend less time organizing and start a conversation right away.

----------

How you can organize your network and achieve more:

- Scan up to 10 business cards at once
No other app scans multiple cards at once, in any way you scatter them. Wantedly People captures them all in a matter of seconds. 

- Turn physical cards into phone contacts
Let the app do the hard work for you. OCR (optical character recognition) detects and analyzes text on cards to instantly create new contacts. Powered by AI (artificial intelligence), the app improves in accuracy with each card it scans. 

- Express yourself through a full professional profile
You’re more than what your card says. Say what you can’t fit in those few square inches through a Wantedly profile complete with a self introduction, work history, education, achievements, projects, social media links, and more.

- Search contacts by name, as well as company and job position
So no worries if you forgot someone's name.

- Call and email contacts
Just tap and go.

- Send instant messages to contacts
Message with Wantedly's agile business chat platform, Wantedly Chat.

- Share and swap business cards with others online
Share a card over chat or email with a temporary URL. It'll expire after a set amount of time to protect privacy.

----------

About Wantedly:

A world in which work meets passion. Wantedly is a professional social network that aims to create that world. By connecting people based on visions instead of salaries, Wantedly helps 1,000,000+ people find just the right place, and 18,000+ companies find just the right talent.
Learn more: 

----------

About Wantedly Chat:

A business chat platform to empower your team to communicate and achieve at record speed—for free.
No more emails. No more lost messages. No more unnecessary meetings.
With an intuitive interface and powerful features, Wantedly Chat enables over 18,000 companies to spend time on what's important.

----------
