title: DoubleTick CRM
description: DoubleTick is the most powerful mobile-friendly WhatsApp business API powered marketing and CRM tool designed to empower your sales engine. Leverage its simple yet powerful conversational commerce ﻿features to boost your sales rate in no time. DoubleTick offers an end-to-end Whatsapp API business solution. This WhatsApp business API powered CRM intelligently stores and manages your customer information and efficiently caters to their needs. This comes enclosed with top-notch features such as a cloud-based team inbox, broadcast and bulk messaging, chatbot, dynamic catalogue, real-time ticket management, in-depth analytics & reports and many more. Invite Members with Specific Role-based Access Control Create teams for your salesperson and define roles. It also means assigning tickets to the team members to address customers’ queries. Detailed Productivity Reports Measure your sales team's performance by analysing their response time and quality. A real-time report will help you better manage, execute, and analyse sales. An in-depth insight will empower you to improve your leads conversion rate, improve campaign quality and team performance. Automatically Save Customers Details in the Database Now save yourself from the hassle of saving customers' details over and again. DoubleTick automatically saves customers' details for you such as name, phone number, type of customer, nature of business interest, chat history, customer journey and so on. WhatsApp Automation Get WhatsApp chatbot API and fulfil your customer's expectations and needs by setting auto-replies to their queries. Set custom message templates and auto-messaging with a CTA button for different ranges of queries. Broadcast and Bulk WhatsApp Messaging Customer engagement and product promotions are fun now with bulk WhatsApp messaging! Save time and increase productivity by sending messages to multiple end-users in one go. Also, either you create a WhatsApp broadcast group or let the system create it for you based on the events. The best part, the message will be delivered to your customer's inbox individually offering them a personalised commerce experience. Centralised WhatsApp Channel Managing customers' queries becomes hassle-free as the entire team will have a unified WhatsApp channel to Interact with the customers that can be accessed with an unlimited number of devices. Now respond to 1000s of customer queries in a second. Cloud-based Team Inbox Have a robust communication system in place by offering a cloud-based inbox for every salesperson that can be accessed at diverse roles. Re-engage Your Customers Lure your customers by sending them notifications on the latest designs, special offers, and much more. You could also configure a template by adding attractive images, descriptions, and prices. Boost Engagement and Relationships Never miss an opportunity to get to know your customers better. Contact your customers individually and reinforce a positive relationship. Share Product Catalogs on WhatsApp Integrate your product catalogues with QuickSell and extensively share them with one or many customers in just one click. Get real-time live analytics reports, inventory status, change product prices as per the need, and much more. Easy Native Integration Choose your favourite tool and integrate it with DoubleTick just in a few clicks. Simple and Mobile-friendly DoubleTick is made to offer you a robust mobile experience where you can manage and control all your business through your smartphone. The intuitive user interface makes it easy to navigate across the feature boards. Learn more about WhatsApp Business API - https://doubletick.io/whatsapp-business-api -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For enterprise enquiries, you can also email us at: sales@doubletick.io

title: Tempo-Team NL Job Agency
description:
The app’s not only great for finding your new job, it’s an easy way to register your hours too. You can do all these things with the Tempo-Team app. At Tempo-Team Job Agency, we have LOTS of jobs at LOTS of different companies that you can apply to.

Have you found a great job? Bingo! Don’t wait, apply now. One click in your Tempo-Team account is all it takes. 

OK, but what kind of jobs are we talking about here? Which jobs can I apply for?

* Well, how about a job in logistics, healthcare, cleaning or customer service? A technical job, or working for the municipality? But we also have administrative jobs and jobs in the hospitality industry for you!
* Are you looking for a part timejob, or do you want to work full time? A temporary job, an after-school job or a permanent job? We’ve got it all! 
* Look for Tempo-Team Go in the app if you want a short gig - you can decide when and where you want to work. Pretty good, right?

I’d like to apply for a job. How does this work?

* It’s amazingly easy to create an account in the app. You will need this account to apply for a job.
* Is this the first time you’re applying for a job? No problem! We will ask some extra details about you. We’ll save them straight away so you don’t need to fill them out again when you apply next time. It saves time ;) and afterwards you can apply with just 1 click!
* Do you want to forward a job vacancy to your laptop because you’d rather apply from there? Or have you found the perfect job for a friend? Well, just forward it! All you need to do is share the link to the job.

And what else can I do with the app?

* The app is high on our list of priorities. In other words, we regularly introduce improvements to make your life easier! For example, you can save job vacancies on your computer and then look at the same ones in the app! Pretty nice, right? And very soon, you’ll be able to create a job alert with the app too!
* So, you’ve found a job through Tempo-Team? Well done! You can still use the app. You see, it’s very convenient for keeping your work records: you can accept shifts for your schedule, register your working hours and check your pay slip!

Is the app acting up? We’d be happy to fix it for you! You can get hold of our app team at any time of the day or night by email. Or you can use Teddy, our assistant & feedback chatbot on the website, to get in touch with your Tempo-Team contact.

title: Gemini: Oil & Gas
description:
The Gemini Oil & Gas app is an innovative digital field management tool that revolutionizes the way oil and gas companies interact with service providers. The platform interfaces with both operators and haulers, allowing complete transparency for all sides while hauling various materials across industries.

The Gemini Oil & Gas app is the industry-preferred solution to digitizing the oilfield and works with all service types in any operation. The workflow within Gemini Oil & Gas app mirrors the complex workflows in the field, making it easy to adopt. 

The cloud-based app makes it easy for your team to get real-time analytics on the work you do every day. The Gemini Oil & Gas app requests access to your location to allow visibility into real-time movements.

title: NEXT for Managers and Crew
description:
For crew: NEXT for Managers and Crew is your personal assistant balancing your work schedule with your life commitments.

For managers: NEXT for Managers and Crew is your intelligent assistant making sure your team members are able to work all the scheduled shifts.

Verify your phone number and update your profile. Then sit back and relax as your personal and store schedules automatically update each week. Tap sync to your phone calendar to get reminders about each upcoming shift - you’ll be at work on time and never miss a shift. Request cover from your coworkers when you can’t work your shift and easily pick up more hours whenever you need extra cash.

title: Spades + Card Game Online
description:
Play Spades + by A-Star Software - the Spades classic card game you know and love, with fun new features and dynamic gameplay!

Spades Online:
Online Spades multiplayer with real people, plus with friends! A huge online community of real people are waiting for you to challenge them to competitive ranked match-ups, or relaxed casual games. Our ranked rating system ensures fair competition - improve your rating & progress through the multiplayer ranks to become the world’s top player! You can compete online with friends to prove you’re the best and win bragging rights, or simply enjoy a friendly low stakes table together.

Spades Offline:
Relaxing offline play against artificial intelligence. Classic offline Spades with no Wi-Fi required. Our smart AI bots will challenge you and teach you some new tricks. You can customize the computer difficulty - play on hard mode to improve your skills for multiplayer games, or play on easy to just have some fun playing offline.

Spades is a classic four player trick taking card game: count your aces and spades cards to make your bid, but pay attention to the other players’ bids too. If you enjoy any classic card game like Hearts, Euchre, Pinnochle, Bridge, Varaq, Rummy, Gin, or Solitaire, you will love our free Spades card game.

Statistics & Achievements!
Track your skills with our free advanced stats. Unlock achievements you can show off top your friends by making clever moves and reaching epic milestones. These work online and offline!

Customize Your Spades!
Tons of options to change classic gameplay rules & settings, card decks, and create your own multiplayer user for free.

A-Star Software is the top card game developer on Android & iOS - check out our free Hearts + & Euchre 3D card game apps for more online & offline multiplayer card game fun!

title: French Tarot
description:
*** PLAY FRENCH TAROT ON YOUR ANDROID SMARTPHONE OR TABLET ! ***

Play the popular French Tarot card game, against opponents simulated by an high-level artificial intelligence.

All official rules are handled :
- Play at 3, 4 or 5 players.
- Declare Handful.
- Declare Misere.
- Lead one trump to the last trick.
- Announce a slam.

*** HIGH QUALITY GRAPHICS *** 

Easy to use, the game is very fast and responsive, with card animation for a more realistic gameplay, and hd graphics.

*** AN HIGH-LEVEL ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE ***

Your opponents and teamates are simulated by an high-level artificial intelligence, that knows the common strategies used in tarot card game. Therefore the game is very realistic, close to game with real players, and the challenge is high.

*** A CUSTOMIZABLE APPLICATION ***

- Play counter-clockwise or clockwise
- Play with or without misere.
- Play with or without Small contract.
- Change the player's name.
- Change the speed of the game
- And many more...

*** AN APPLICATION THAT WILL MAKE YOU BECOME BETTER ***

A section with statistics is included in the application, allowing you to monitor the evolution of our performances. 

For beginners, rules of French Tarot are also included into the application.

Finally, you can at the end of the round see all the tricks, and replay the round if we want, to train and try new strategies.

For any question regarding the application : support.tarot@eryodsoft.com

Have fun playing Tarot !

title: Cyber Jass Schieber
description: The Schieber Jass for mobile (or Chibre in French), funny, free and easy to handle, Multiplayer or Solo. The game implements the Schieber Jass, a typically Swiss deck card game, for 4 players. Developed to have fun alone or with friends, with the variants Swiss French 'simple', 'pique double', or the Swiss German 'unte-ufe' and 'zig-zag'. If you are alone, the partner and the opponents are simulated by the computer, with an efficient artificial intelligence. This is the free android version of Cyberjass, the most downloaded French Jass version on PC. Cyber Jass offers the following functionalities: Offline: -Various sceneries available. -Variants 'simple', 'pique double', 'unte-ufe', 'zig-zag', etc. -Help, suggestions and explanations, that suits beginners and experts. -Winning games in memory. -Cancellation and forward at will. -A Customizable Artificial Intelligence. Online: -Free network games. -Join and leave (after 1 game min.) whenever you want: Total freedom and never wait. -Plenty of awards. -Disconnected players are replaced by the artificial intelligence, in a way the game always goes on. -Online scores. -Allow to start its own online private server. -Online game shared with other platforms (PC, Linux, IOS, web). -Minimal online data consumption, 34 KBytes per game.

title: Bridge Card Game
description:
How to play the bridge card game - free & offline game for beginners & adults 🤔:

🙋‍♂️ Bridge Card Game is a cousin of Bid Whist and Spades as they are all derived from the age old game of whist. The goal of a Bridge Card Game (also known as Contract Bridge or Rubber Bridge) is to be the team (partnership) at the end of the match with the most total points. The match (called a rubber) ends when a team wins 2 bridge card games. A game is won by getting a "contract" score of 100 or more points over several deals if necessary.

Game Tutorial:
✔️ Goals of bidding of a classic bridge card game:
At the beginning of a deal, you must state the number of "tricks" you think your team can win with a specific "trump suit". A bid includes a number (1-7) and a trump suit (or no trump, NT). The team that makes the final bid must win at least that number of tricks plus 6. The final highest bid is known as the "contract". 

✔️Bidding Process
Each player can either bid or pass when it's their turn. Alternately, each player could double their opponents most recent bid. The opponents' team can then redouble the bid. Under double or redouble, that game rewards double or quadruple points respectively. The bidding ends when 3 players in a row pass. The player that makes the first bid of the trump suit is called the "declarer".

✔️Gameplay
The player to the declarer's left chooses a card from their hand to lead the first trick. After that, the declarer's partner's hand is placed on the table (called the "dummy hand") and is played by the declarer for the remainder of the deal. Each player must follow the suit of the lead if they are able, otherwise they can play any other suit, including the trump. The trick is won by the highest trump, or if no trumps were played by the highest card of the lead suit. The winner of each trick leads the next trick.


✔️Scoring
The declarer's team gains contract points if they fulfill the contract. Overtrick points are assigned for each trick that was taken above the contract's stated number. Undertrick points are awarded to the declarer's opposing team if the declarer's team does not fulfill the contract. Contract, Over and Under points are further increased for a doubled or redoubled contract.

Base contract scoring for each is as follows. If trumps are clubs or diamonds: 20 per trick. If trumps are hearts or spades: 30 per trick. If Notrump(NT): 40 for the first trick and 30 for each subsequent trick.

After a team scores 100 or more contract points the game is complete and the next game starts. Extra points are awarded for winning a small slam (12 tricks) or a grand slam (13 tricks). Honors points are given for starting the deal with the top 4 or 5 trumps (A K Q J 10). 

We hope you enjoy and learn playing our classic bridge card game. You can play the tournament offline without connecting to the internet or the wifi. It's a great way to practice and improve before playing and competing against your friends in the real world. Don't forget to check our other collections of card games which include Blackjack 21, Gin Rummy, Baccarat, Pyramid Solitaire & Crescent Solitaire.

We have tried to make the computer players (robot) as realistic and challenging as we could using techniques like AI and neural networks.

In case of any issues with the app or feedback please contact our team at hello@thecardgamescompany.com.

title: Naija Whot Pro
description:
NaijaWhot Pro is an exciting, classic and healthy card game for everyone. It is simple to play. Become a winner by finishing your cards before the beast in your palm. It keeps you comfort when it's needed and your mind focused when you are idle. The artificial intelligence keeps it challenging all the time.

MORE FEATURES ADDED

1. QuickPlay mode --- our old style. You and one artificial person

2. Tournament mode ---- compete with three artificial persons (Wazobia)

3. Multiplayer mode ---- play with one of your friends ONLINE or OFFLINE. This mode supports two players only.

4. Defence ---- you can now defend special cards (turn it on from settings).

5. Continuous play ---- this feature is only available in Tournament mode. You can decide whether game continues even when you lose (Enable it from settings).

6. Anthem can now be turned on /off
7.  You can make the game challenging by choosing which special card to play with.

8. Reset scores and coins when needed.
9. Turn on/off avatars(images) at your will

10. French language added. ------- the game can automatically detect your device language and switch between English and French.

And many more.

title: Maru - ComicViewer/TextReader
description:
This is an app that allows you to open text files, comic files, compressed files, PDF, epub files stored on your Android phone or web server and view them as if they were books.

It does not provide content (novel/manga files) by default.
※ Only Google Play Protect-certified devices are supported.

The main features are as follows.


1. text viewer

  - Support TXT, CSV, SMI, SUB, SRT
  - Support EPUB  (text and picture display), support built-in font
  - Open compressed text (ZIP, RAR, 7Z, ALZ/EGG) directly
  - Changeable fonts (san-serif/serif/custom font), adjust size/spacing/margins etc
  - Changeable character encoding (Auto/UTF-8,...)
  - Changeable text/background color/background image
  - Page turning method: arrow/screen tap/screen drag/volume button
  - Page turning effect (animation) : roll over, slide, swipe, scroll
  - Various Quick navigation: navigation bar, dial, page input
  - Add/rename/sort/lookup bookmarks
  - Text-to-Speech: language selection, speed control, special characters/kanji exclusion
  - Slideshow: adjustable speed
  - Search text: one by one, search all
  - Edit text: edit, add new file
  - Text alignment: left, justified, 2-sheet horizontal view
  - Quick brightness
  - Sentence organization
 

2. comic viewer

  - Support JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, WEBP, TIFF, HEIC, AVIF, ZIP, RAR, 7Z, CBZ, CBR, CB7, ALZ/EGG, PDF files
  - Open compressed pictures (ZIP, RAR, 7Z, ALZ/EGG) directly
  - Support zip streaming
  - Support double compression
  - PDF: zoom up to 8x and sharpen option when zooming in
  - Left-right order/shuffle: left -> right, right->left (Japanese style), landscape 2-page view
  - Support zoom in-out, magnify
  - Page turning method: arrow/scroll tab/scroll drag/volume button
  - Page turning effect (animation): left/right scroll, up/down scroll, webtoon scroll
   Webtoon scroll can smoothly scroll very long pictures.
  - Quick navigation: navigation bar, dial, page input
  - Add/rename/sort/lookup bookmarks
  - Slideshow: set in seconds
  - Keep picture zoomed in
  - Support animated gif/webp/avif
  - Support picture rotation (manual rotation, Auto rotation of JPEG/Webp)
  - Double filter(inversion, sepia, sharpen, ...)
  - Support cropping edge


3. file function

  - Color mark of reading history: red(recent), green(partially read), blue(fully read)
  - Picture Preview: Tiled(Large, Small), Detail
  - Selectable file extension
  - Sorting : Name, Size, Date
  - Support delete rename, copy, move
  - Searching: file name, content, picture
  - Support uncompressing manually
  - Support read or write of USB storage(FAT32,NTFS,exFAT)


4. other

  - Theme/Color
  - Support language selection (Korean, Chinese, Japanese, English, ...)
  - Support Auto Synchornization of reading history
  - Support SFTP (secure file transport protocol)
  - Support FTP (file transport protocol)
  - Support SMB (Windows Shared Folder, Samba)
  - Support WebDAV
  - Support Google Drive
  - Support Dropbox
  - Support MS OneDrive
  - Password lock
  - Support S-pen of Samsung Note 9 and above: page turning, pausing slideshow
  - Headset button support: pausing slideshow
  - Media button (Bluetooth earphone, etc.) support: pausing TTS
  - Backup/restore settings (Maru, Arar compatible)
  - Shortcut management (e.g. add/delete shortcut of other apps)

title: VOYP - Voice Over Your Phone
description:
VOYP is the ultimate AI-powered virtual assistant that makes phone calls on your behalf, so you don’t have to. Utilizing cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence and natural language processing, VOYP handles calls seamlessly and efficiently. Integrate your calendar to manage scheduling, and select from various assistant personalities to match your needs perfectly.

How VOYP Can Help You:

- Make Reservations: Book tables at restaurants or order takeout with ease.
- Schedule Appointments: Manage appointments for doctors, salons, and more.
- Entertainment: Have fun with friends by making playful prank calls.
- Customer Service: Get information, quotes, check order statuses, and resolve issues without spending your time on the phone.

Accessibility Benefits:

VOYP is a game-changer for those with speech impairments, social anxiety, or other conditions that make phone calls challenging. Gain independence and convenience with VOYP handling your calls.

Features:

- Natural Conversations: VOYP uses natural language, ensuring the person on the other end believes they’re speaking with a real human.
- Test your setting before you make the call
- Privacy and Security: Your information remains private and secure.
- AI-Powered Efficiency: Advanced AI makes interactions smooth and effective.
- Call Recordings: Record your calls and listen to the audio at your best convenience
- Call Transfer: Transfer live calls to any of your verified numbers
- Call Sharing: Share your calls with anyone

Why Choose VOYP?

VOYP provides an accessible solution for maintaining independence and getting tasks done without the hassle of phone calls. Focus on what truly matters to you while VOYP takes care of the rest.

Business Assistant

With Voyp you can also manage your business profile and have the AI Assistant make calls on behalf of your company. It's a great tool for leads and customer engagement.

Download VOYP Now!

title: Avaya Cloud Office
description:
Call, meet, message and more! Avaya Cloud Office lets you simplify the way your business communicates with a unified experience that’s intuitive to use and accessible from a phone, a browser or any mobile device. From a single interface you’ll chat with colleagues, make and receive calls, plan and join meetings, collaborate with screen sharing and video, and keep your teams on-task with file sharing, task management and virtual team rooms that let everyone share and stay up to date.

With Avaya Cloud Office you will:

Accelerate your decision making with team messaging:
Message individuals or teams in real time to stay connected, bring remote workers together, and resolve business issues, questions and decisions instantly. Share files, assign tasks and schedule meetings with a few simple clicks.

Optimize employee and customer collaboration with frictionless video meetings:
Schedule and launch video meetings directly from the app or invite guests to join from their favorite browser. No download and no delay with all the benefits of screen sharing, in-meeting chat, recording and markup tools.

Connect with intuitive, feature-rich HD calling:
Find and connect with your customers and colleagues with one click. Know who called and when, and invoke the features you need through the intuitive interface.  Seamlessly move from one device to another as your busy day unfolds.

Simplify your communications with a single number:
Call, text (SMS) and Fax using your Avaya Cloud Office business number. No need for your customers to remember multiple numbers and no need for you to mix business with personal communications. 

Get more done with integrations that make sense for the way you work:
You rely on desktop apps, workflow automation, and customer relationship management to get your work done every day. With Avaya Cloud Office, you can integrate those apps with your communications, creating a seamless experience that eliminates the need to switch between applications. 

An Avaya Cloud Office subscription is required.  Features may vary by plan and country.

Terms of Service: https://www.ringcentral.com/legal//eulatos.html
Privacy Notice: https://www.ringcentral.com/legal/privacy-notice.html
Acceptable Use Policy: https://www.ringcentral.com/legal/acceptable-use-policy.html
Emergency Services Policy: https://www.ringcentral.com/legal/emergency-services.html

Connect with intuitive, feature-rich HD calling:
Find and connect with your customers and colleagues with one click. Know who called and when, and invoke the features you need through the intuitive interface.  Seamlessly move from one device to another as your busy day unfolds.

Simplify your communications with a single number:
Call, text (SMS) and Fax using your Avaya Cloud Office business number. No need for your customers to remember multiple numbers and no need for you to mix business with personal communications. 

Get more done with integrations that make sense for the way you work:
You rely on desktop apps, workflow automation, and customer relationship management to get your work done every day. With Avaya Cloud Office, you can integrate those apps with your communications, creating a seamless experience that eliminates the need to switch between applications. 

An Avaya Cloud Office

title: Online chat, calls - Gem Space
description:
Gem Space is a smart and private messenger where you can find news and blogs, chat and calls, business communities, friendly communication and chatting with like-minded people. We make sure that all our users feel secure: our chats are encrypted, any video call is protected - communication spaces are private or public, as desired.

FOR YOU AND YOUR FRIENDS
Choose what you enjoy, subscribe to the best and most popular bloggers, get entertained, learn and become a better version of yourself.

Smart news feed
Choose your interests, subscribe to themed channels, chat with friends while AI will analyze your activity and offer infinitely updated content in convenient  formats - from short videos to long reads.

Quick search for new sources of inspiration
Use the built-in catalogue of channels and instantly find content and blogs you seek through smart search.

General and private chats
Gem Space is a messenger where you can communicate with no boundaries in any format - texts, stickers, audio and video. Remain connected to your close ones in any part of the world.

Free calls
Use with no restrictions on any device and platform, gather conferences for up to 1000 people and call non-registered users in our app.

Communities by interests
Find new friends to chat to in communities, be on the same page with like-minded people and become a part of something bigger!

FOR BLOGGERS AND CONTENT CREATORS
Inspire new experiences, travel, invent, share your views with the world.

Channels
Share news, create articles, upload videos, while smart algorithms will find your readers.

Catalogue of channels
Upload great content, communicate with readers and bring communities to the top - catalog of channels will account your efforts and attract organic users through the recommendation system.

Communities
Create and manage communities as your own media:
unite readers in channels and chats by niches and topics;
keep up to date with community events using the news feed;
make joining a community accessible only by invitation or to everyone;
organize important information in a community using collections.

FOR BUSINESS
Combine teamwork and business management in one application.

Communities
Сommunicate with your team and organize communication using the Communities framework.

Chat and conference with recording ability
Send messages, call, organize conferences in our app for up to 1000 people for team members and partners.

Calls to unregistered users in our messenger
Call to any device and platform with no restrictions.

Private messenger 
Allow entry to team space only though invitations.

Secure communication
Be confident in encryption of your data, while calls are private and confidential.

Integration through API
Set up collaboration between teams and manage the company’s business operation by integrating corporate services through API.

Solution of all daily tasks
Edit messages at any time, share documents and manage communication with your team in chats.

New audience
Grow your business in app by means of new communication channels and distribution.

title: Handcent Next SMS messenger
description:
Upgrade your messaging experience. Enjoy unlimited customization, AI features, cloud backup, MMS Plus , upmost privacy, and smooth texting on PC and tablet. It is the perfect alternative to stock SMS text messenger and Verizon Messages+ Secure and private messenger Best SMS app with personalization AI capabilities - powered by OpenAI to make texting easier Encrypted chat - Reliable guard to keep texts safe Texting from any system/device with 'Anywhere' Cloud backup - never worry about long texts again Lots of Stickers, emojis, and gifs to choose from Wear OS device support(Dependent on phone app) Group or mass texts to multiple recipients Support for foldables, like Samsung fold Support for most android versions (4.4 to 13) and Lineage OS 19 Dual SIM support

Security

For every update, it'll be scanned with *VirualTotal* 60+ mainstream anti-virus engines to make sure it's safe. Protecting data privacy is our top priority. Conversations now can be encrypted as per your need

AI features

-Detects sensitive information and suggests masking options. -Extract, copy, search, and share text from images -Generate descriptive text for photos -Summary of recent conversations -Grammar & Spell Check: Ensure your messages are clear and error-free -AI Emoji Suggestions -AI Auto-Reply

Messenger Customization

The theme store offers over 200 themes with new ones updated weekly. You can personalize fonts, stickers, colors, ringtones, LED colors, vibration patterns, etc.

Handcent Anywhere - best private texting on computer and tablet.

Cross-platform texting on all systems and device. Windows, Mac OS, Linux, iOS, android, computers, tablets, and smartwatches all have separate apps. You can text anywhere without the phone. Go to aw.handcent.com and start messaging. Group text is also supported

Wear OS

Receive and reply messages on all android-based smartwatches, with the features like voice to text, etc. Support Wear OS , Galaxy Watch series with Tizen and both square and round watches(Phone app needed, doesn't work as a standalone app)

MMS

MMS is fast and stable, can receive all kinds of MMS messages and share full-size multimedia with MMS plus. MMS plus can act as a multimedia files downloader, and save them on the private cloud.

Pop up text

Quick reply text messages within a pop up window.

Private Box

An encrypted text message box that can only be opened by unique passcode. Texts within can only be viewed by yourself.

SMS Backup

Never worry about losing texts or messages with our backup service. Restore all private messages (SMS/MMS) and settings when you switch to a new phone or reset the phone.

Search

You can search text messages by time, message type and etc. All SMS messages with text are searchable

SMS Blocker/Blacklisting

Block all unwanted or spam SMS & MMS messages in our private android text messaging app.

Spam filter

Automatically filter and block potential spam messages

Scheduled Task

Schedule texts to be sent at a given time.

Emoji

You will love animated emojis that complies with the newest emoji standard.

Stickers

Integrated with Giphy. Send messages with stickers by using quick search.

Drive mode

Read texts or mute during drive to ensure driving safety with Android Auto support

Text to Speech

Read texts out loud with support for repeated reminder

Sticky on top

Pin your private contacts on top for quicker access Other improvements. Built-in ChatGPT to let you talk to AI as a conversation thread Group Messaging Chat: Create a group with friends, all contacts will receive the message. Send mass texts with stickers to all members. Other features: Bulk Mass SMS & MMS, group text, text snippets and etc. If you encounter any problems or need help, please reach us at help@handcent.com. We will provide help in a timely manner.

title: Heartbeat
description:
Heartbeat is the home for all your online communities. Create a space where you and your community can have fun through chats, threads, voice, and video. Heartbeat works great for online schools, accelerators, incubators, paid communities, innovations hubs, support groups, and so much more! Whether its a massive, established community, or your just getting started, Heartbeat makes is easy to build lasting, genuine relationship

LAUNCH AN INVITE-ONLY COMMUNITY SPACE:

- Customize channels to use posts or chats and design a space just for you and community to have deep discussions about the how the world is changing or just to share the best restaurants in Atlanta.
- Voice rooms help you take your conversations to the next level — jump into a voice room with 1 click to easily take your conversations IRL
- Presence indicators floating around the app show you where other people are, and make it feel like you in the same room

CREATE A LASTING LIBRARY OF KNOWLEDGE

- Turn hot posts into long-lasting knowledge base articles & grow your community off the great conversations that happen
- Organize information vital to your community members & create a space they always reference for the best information
- Manage access through powerful permissioning tools native to Hearbeat

SCALE YOUR COMMUNITY LIKE A BOSS

- Use deep integrations with Zoom, Google Calendar, Salesforce, Hubspot, Airtable, and more to automate community actions & track deep analytics over time to see how your community is growing
- Automate in-community match-ups and conversations through customizable, weekly Heartbeat intros
- Create moderators, special access permissions, manage payments, oversee projects & more within your customizable community space

title: Voice Text - Text Voice FULL
description:
VOICE TO TEXT (Talk and write your words as text) 
	-Thanks to "Speech Recognition" you can talk and your words will be converted into characters and written as a text on the screen.
	-Continuous voice recognition.
	-Select different results (interpretations).
	-Better results with Internet, but you can use without Internet (only one result).
	
TEXT TO VOICE (Write or import text and listen to it with the robot voice)
	-Thanks to "Text To Speech" you can type any text which will be spoken by a digital voice.
	-You can add files from your device into the app and read it aloud.
	-Text to speech is very useful for people with no speech communication, since you can write your words and they will be read by the digital voice.
	-Listen to books.

FEATURES
	-Small keyboard scrollable with interchangeable positions.
	-Working with files: txt, pdf, epub, html and open websites.
	-Save notes as file, as audio.
	-List files.
	-Copy audio and text files into the app.
	-Share text and files to others apps on your device. 
	(The application neither synchronize nor save files on the cloud, easily, you can share it to do your own backup).
	
ENGINE(S)
	-Text to Voice depends on the motor(s) or engine(s) of your device (rare case there is none, you must download some).
	
LANGUAGES AND VOICES
	-You can set it in any language and any voice supported for your device and engines.
	-Without Internet you may need to download some languages first.
	-The robot voices can be male or female (this depends on the engines).
	-See Menu-Info if you have troubles. 
	
PREFERENCES
	-See Menu-Preferences to adapt the most personal use.
	
AUDIO RECORDER
	-The app include an Audio Recorder.
	
AUDIO TO TEXT (experimental)
	-An Audio Player is used to play and pause a file so that you can use Voice to Text (red microphone) and capture the results.
	IMPORTANT
	-It is not an automatic conversion.
	-An audio file is not magically converted into a text file in one click.
	-Video to Text is not supported.
	-It is an experimental part.

PERMISSIONS		
	- Write/Read on external storage.		
	- Record using the microphone.

UTILITY
	-Write text that you want to send or share with others apps.
	-Use this app before using others to avoid error typing.
	-It is helpful in your daily use of Android.
	-Speak and take notes without using the keyboard.

PUBLICITY
	-The app has publicity and is free. 
		
Thanks for your suggestions, opinions, comments!

title: Smart Messages
description: Smart Messages is the Best SMS, MMS & RCS (Chat) replacement texting app for your phone, with the greatest advanced and rich chat features for a gorgeous and fast texting experience with your friends. And the best part? It’s all completely free! Rich Communication Features Smart Messages packs a modern Delivery and Read Receipt feature for SMS/MMS that works just like in popular instant messaging apps but without creating an account. It also has a fast and accurate Typing Indicator that shows you when your friends are texting you. Note: The delivery receipts work out of the box, however the read receipts and typing indicator require Internet access and that your contacts use Smart Messages too. Rich Communication Features are compatible with every phone number and all mobile carriers. Smart Messages is the BEST alternative to your stock SMS, MMS and RCS (chat) texting app, and the 1st messaging app with a predictive AI engine that anticipates what you want so you don’t have to search. See, not all texting apps are the same. If you are looking for the best SMS app 2023 look no further. With Smart Messages you get a messenger with first-class user experience, saving you time and making your life easier. Smart Messages has a great user interface based on the latest Material Design principles and offers the most complete set of features that you will love: read receipts and typing indicator (RCS features are only available to Smart Messages users), group chat, fast replies, emoji predictions based on intelligent emotion recognition in your text messages, easy sharing of videos, images, your geolocation… Texting with friends and family will never be the same! Smart Messages is 100% FREE FOREVER (NO subscription, NO paid features), does not track you, and protects your privacy as well as your phone data! Download now the best SMS app for Android and start a magical journey! Spam Blocker Mark any conversation as spam, and all similar messages will automagically go to spam next time you receive them. Group Chat Send and receive messages from multiple recipients, all in the same place. Please be aware that your carrier may limit this feature. Dual SIM Switch easily between two phone numbers. Smart Notifications Answer directly from notifications with a full-featured experience. Fast Reply Respond to messages even faster with smart suggestions. Magic Cards Smart Messages uses Artificial Intelligence (AI) to show you relevant actions when you need them, like a "Copy code" option when you receive a code or one-time password (OTP). It can also show you smart actions for calls, emails, maps and calendar events. Display Magic Cards with a short tap on any message marked with the ✨ icon. Pro Tip: You can also share Magic Cards! Just long press the card and choose if you want to send it to your current contact (drop on the right button) or to someone else (left button). Pin to Top Long-press to pin your favorite chats on top of the list. Mass Sending Bulk send any message with the multiple SMS option. Schedule sending Define a date and time and automatically postpone sending a message. Dark Mode Manually or automatically switch to dark mode at predefined hours. Emoji Predictions Get emoji suggestions related with the emotion in your message. Download this option from “Settings” – it’s free! Wallpapers and Themes Personalize screens and chat bubbles with custom colors, and set cool wallpapers or any of your own pictures as background in your chats. And more... Spam box, contact blocking, notification privacy, scroll buttons, etc. Completely Free Smart Messages is forever free of charge and without subscription. Your privacy is our top priority! We don’t store any of your data on our servers. Check out our Privacy Policy for more details about our commitment to protect your privacy.
